title: YTP Tennis - So A Fox Walks In To A Wolf's Den...
description:
Round 1 vs HowlTheGrayWolf

There are a couple portions in this video in which I may have overdone the visuals. The reason I mention this is because I have had one heck of a time trying to render and upload this video. It constantly wants to get off-sync due to a specific part near the beginning, thus causing issues throughout the rest of the video. 

As a result, there is a portion of the video missing in an effort to alleviate the problem. Apologies to my subscribers and HowlTheGrayWolf for this annoying flaw. =/

DISCLAIMER: I don't own any of these clips. This video does not represent the opinions of the original creators of these clips. I am not profiting from their use in any way.
